from manim import *

class EigenvaluesAndEigenvectors(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Section 1 — Setup
        title = Text("Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors", font_size=36, color=WHITE)
        title.to_edge(UP, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(title))

        matrix = np.array([[2, 1], [1, 1]])
        self.wait(1)

        # Section 2 — Matrix Introduction
        matrix_text = MathTex(r"A = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 \end{bmatrix}", font_size=36)
        matrix_text.next_to(title, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        self.play(Write(matrix_text))
        self.wait(1)

        # Section 3 — Eigenvalues
        eigenvalue_text = Text("Eigenvalues", font_size=24, color=BLUE)
        eigenvalue_text.next_to(matrix_text, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        self.play(Write(eigenvalue_text))

        eigenvalues = np.linalg.eigvals(matrix)
        eigenvalue1 = MathTex(r"\lambda_1 = {:.2f}".format(eigenvalues[0]), font_size=24, color=BLUE)
        eigenvalue2 = MathTex(r"\lambda_2 = {:.2f}".format(eigenvalues[1]), font_size=24, color=BLUE)
        eigenvalue1.next_to(eigenvalue_text, DOWN, buff=0.2)
        eigenvalue2.next_to(eigenvalue1, DOWN, buff=0.2)
        self.play(Write(eigenvalue1), Write(eigenvalue2))
        self.wait(1)

        # Section 4 — Eigenvectors
        eigenvector_text = Text("Eigenvectors", font_size=24, color=GREEN)
        eigenvector_text.next_to(eigenvalue2, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        self.play(Write(eigenvector_text))

        eigenvectors = np.linalg.eig(matrix)[1]
        eigenvector1 = MathTex(r"v_1 = \begin{bmatrix} {:.2f} \\ {:.2f} \end{bmatrix}".format(eigenvectors[0, 0], eigenvectors[1, 0]), font_size=24, color=GREEN)
        eigenvector2 = MathTex(r"v_2 = \begin{bmatrix} {:.2f} \\ {:.2f} \end{bmatrix}".format(eigenvectors[0, 1], eigenvectors[1, 1]), font_size=24, color=GREEN)
        eigenvector1.next_to(eigenvector_text, DOWN, buff=0.2)
        eigenvector2.next_to(eigenvector1, DOWN, buff=0.2)
        self.play(Write(eigenvector1), Write(eigenvector2))
        self.wait(1.5)

        # Section 5 — Conclusion
        conclusion_text = Text("Conclusion", font_size=24, color=YELLOW)
        conclusion_text.next_to(eigenvector2, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        self.play(Write(conclusion_text))
        self.wait(2)

        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
